title: सीता सहस्रनाम स्तोत्रम्
devanagariText:
॥ श्री सीता सहस्रनाम स्तोत्रम् ॥

ॐ सीता जानकी वैदेही मैथिली भूमिनन्दिनी।
रामप्रिया रामपत्नी रामवामांगवासिनी॥ १॥

जनकात्मजा राजपुत्री धनुर्यज्ञसमागता।
स्वयंवरवधूः श्रेष्ठा सीतारामविवाहिता॥ २॥

अयोध्येश्वरी राज्ञी दशरथस्नुषा शुभा।
कौसल्यावत्सला नित्यं सुमित्रासम्मता सदा॥ ३॥

पतिव्रता धर्मपत्नी सती साध्वी पतिप्रिया।
वनवासिनी तापसी च पर्णकुटीनिवासिनी॥ ४॥

लङ्काविप्रवासिनी शोकाकुला अशोकवनवासिनी।
त्रिजटासहचरी धीरा हनूमद्दर्शनोत्सुका॥ ५॥

चूडामणिप्रदात्री च रामसन्देशवाहिनी।
रावणतिरस्कारिणी शीलसम्पत्स्वरूपिणी॥ ६॥

अग्निपरीक्षासम्पन्ना शुद्धा पावनरूपिणी।
पुष्पकारूढा विजयिनी अयोध्यागमनोत्सुका॥ ७॥

राज्यलक्ष्मीः प्रजामाता लवकुशजननी शुभा।
वाल्मीकिआश्रमवासिनी धरणीगर्भगामिनी॥ ८॥

महालक्ष्मीस्वरूपा च विष्णुपत्नी सनातनी।
सर्वमङ्गलमाङ्गल्या सर्वसौभाग्यदायिनी॥ ९॥

सर्वदेवनमस्कृता सर्वलोकपूजिता शिवा।
जगन्माता जगद्धात्री सीतामाता नमोऽस्तु ते॥ १०॥

॥ इति श्री सीता सहस्रनाम स्तोत्रम् (मुख्य अंश) सम्पूर्णम् ॥
transliteration:
|| Shri Sita Sahasranama Stotram ||

Om Sita Janaki Vaidehi Maithili Bhuminandini |
Ramapriya Ramapatni Ramavamangavasini || 1 ||

Janakatmaja Rajaputri Dhanuryajnasamagata |
Swayamvaravadhuh Shreshtha Sitaramavivahita || 2 ||

Ayodhyeshvari Rajni Dasharathasnusha Shubha |
Kausalyavatsala Nityam Sumitrasammata Sada || 3 ||

Pativrata Dharmapatni Sati Sadhvi Patipriya |
Vanavasini Tapasi Cha Parnakutinivasini || 4 ||

Lankavipravasini Shokakula Ashokavanavasini |
Trijatasahachari Dhira Hanumaddarshanotsuqa || 5 ||

Chudamani Pradatri Cha Ramasandeshavahini |
Ravanatiraskarini Sheelasampattsvarupini || 6 ||

Agnipariksha Sampanna Shuddha Pavanarupini |
Pushpakarudha Vijayini Ayodhyagamanotsuka || 7 ||

Rajyalakshmih Prajamata Lavakushajanani Shubha |
Valmikiashramavasini Dharanigarbhagamini || 8 ||

Mahalakshmi Svarupa Cha Vishnupatni Sanatani |
Sarvamangalamangalya Sarvasaubhagyadayini || 9 ||

Sarvadevanamaskriita Sarvaloka Pujita Shiva |
Jaganmata Jagaddhatri Sitamata Namostu Te || 10 ||

|| Iti Shri Sita Sahasranama Stotram (Mukhya Amsha) Sampurnam ||
hindiMeaning:
सीता, जानकी, वैदेही, मैथिली, भूमिनन्दिनी, रामप्रिया, रामपत्नी — इन नामों से माता सीता का स्मरण।

जनकात्मजा, स्वयंवर वधू, अयोध्येश्वरी, पतिव्रता, वनवासिनी, अशोकवनवासिनी।

अग्निपरीक्षा में शुद्ध, राज्यलक्ष्मी, लवकुश की माता, वाल्मीकि आश्रमवासिनी।

महालक्ष्मी स्वरूपा, सर्वमंगलमांगल्या, जगन्माता — माता सीता को नमस्कार।
benefits: Thousand names of Mata Sita in her complete life journey
Grants supreme saubhagya and marital harmony
Bestows pativrata shakti and family blessings
Sacred for Sita Navami, Vivah Panchami, and Ram Navami
description: Among the most cherished prayers to Goddess Sita, Sita Sahasranama Stotram (सीता सहस्रनाम स्तोत्रम्) stands as a sacred recitation of 1000 divine names. Attributed to Ananda Ramayana, this prayer holds a special place in Hindu devotional literature. Devotees recite this prayer to grant supreme saubhagya and marital harmony and thousand names of Mata Sita in her complete life journey. It is also said to bestow pativrata shakti and family blessings. It is especially recommended on Friday (Shukravar) and during Sita Navami, Vivah Panchami, and Ram Navami for maximum spiritual benefit. Comprising 10 verses, it can be completed in approximately 7 minutes, making it suitable for daily devotional practice. On this page, you can read the complete Sita Sahasranama Stotram in Devanagari Sanskrit with English transliteration, Hindi meaning (arth), and free PDF download for offline recitation.
seoDescription: Read Sita Sahasranama in Sanskrit with Hindi meaning. Thousand names of Mata Sita for saubhagya, protection, and devotion.
